name: Old Fashioned Macaroni and Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 8 oz. package of elbow macaroni, cooked and drained
2 1/2 cups (10 oz) shredded cheddar cheese, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 2-quart casserole dish.
2. Layer one-third noodles, one-third cheese (repeat layers), saving the last layer of cheese for the final 10 minutes of cooking.
3. Combine milk, eggs, salt, and pepper in a bowl and pour over all ingredients.
4. Dot with butter.
5. Cover and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
6. Uncover and sprinkle with remaining cheese and paprika.
7. Bake for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
